title: ChaosCraft
description: Troll your server with explosive chaos and laughter
body:
### **ChaosCraft**

ChaosCraft is the ultimate Minecraft troll plugin, built to turn any normal server into a playground of chaos, laughter, and pure mayhem.

Instead of the usual calm survival experience, ChaosCraft brings admins a special set of troll tools and powers that will leave players asking one question: “Why would you do that?!”

🎉 Features

Chaos Menu – Open a custom admin-only menu with /CC to access all the troll items and powers in one place.

Lightning Stick ⚡ – Smite players, mobs, or entire forests instantly.

Creeper Bow 💥 – Shoot arrows that spawn creepers where they land.

TNT Bow 🎯 – Who needs arrows when you can shoot live explosives?


Ultimate Troll Tools 🤡 – Items designed purely for pranks, confusion, and unforgettable server moments.

…and this is just the beginning. More chaos is always coming.

😂 Why use ChaosCraft?

Because normal Minecraft is fun… but Minecraft with chaos is hilarious.
Perfect for:

Pranking your friends until they rage quit.


Spicing up survival with unpredictable madness.

Testing the sanity (and patience) of your players.

ChaosCraft isn’t about balance. It isn’t about fairness. It’s about creating legendary memories through chaotic fun and troll energy.

📖 How to use

Install the plugin on your Paper/Spigot server. Click [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chaoscraft/versions) to download!

Use /CC givemenu to open the give menu.

![GiveMenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41c991a797d2d52d3406ff7324695fa01a334fe8_0.webp)

Select your favorite troll actions.

![Troll Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f35cbc8434e2227b2420ed87a238360b3c4bb585.png)
![Troll menu 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4dae00faeb356b36fc7510306d936246cebee38.png)

Release pure mayhem.

It’s that easy.

🧨 Disclaimer

ChaosCraft may cause:

Sudden bursts of laughter.

Angry friends.

Exploding bases.

Endless stories you’ll never forget.

Use responsibly (or irresponsibly — we won’t judge).

👉 With ChaosCraft, your server will never be boring again.
Unleash the chaos. Troll responsibly. Or don’t.
WARNING: THE PLUGIN DOES NOT MAKE CHAOS AUTOMATICALLY!
